strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput micro-services, matching the Principal-level experience bar
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq — direct alignment with the AI strategy focus

Entrepreneurial founder of GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform on Kubernetes) plus conference speaking and workshop leadership, demonstrating startup-within-org mindset and ability to inspire others
concerns: No explicit Master's or PhD in an AI-related field listed among preferred qualifications
Cloud experience centers on AWS CDK and Kubernetes deployments rather than a deep platform-strategy track record
Most recent AI work is relatively new (2025-present) versus a long-established AI product portfolio

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling work
15+ years polyglot full-stack and infrastructure depth
Founder of open-source platform plus public speaking and workshops

response.justification: Bogdan brings the 15-year multi-domain engineering depth the role demands, spanning low-latency micro-services at Dunnhumby, fintech platforms at RIDE, AWS/TypeScript product work at Optilyz, and embedded/hardware systems at National Instruments and Altom. His current role at re:cinq is squarely on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic-workflow frameworks — exactly the builder-fluent AI expertise the job seeks. Founding and sustaining GISCollective as an open-source Kubernetes-deployed platform demonstrates the entrepreneurial, startup-within-org instinct the preferred qualifications call out, while his conference talks, workshops, and Selenium course evidence the ability to inspire and teach internally and externally. Taken together, he reads as a credible Principal-level candidate worth advancing.
